    🔥Shengdi Zhou

    Fourth-Year PhD in School of Economy and Management of East China Normal University (ECNU)

    • ShangHai,China

    💁‍♀️ 周胜娣

    周胜娣 (1999.02), received her B.Eng. degree (2019 - 2021) from School of Economy and Management in East China Normal University. She is currently pursuing her doctorate degree, under the guidance of Professor Faqin Lan at School of Economy and Management in East China Normal University (2021 - 2026).

    Her research focuses on mergers and acquisitions and digital economy.

    📝 Publications

    1. [世界经济’25] Faqin Lan, Shengdi Zhou. 数字化转型、企业适度规模与并购行为, PDF.
    2. [Digital Economy and Sustainable Development’24] Shengdi Zhou, Faqin Lan, Zirui Hu, Yongting Liu. Determinants of Successful Mergers and Acquisitions in China: Evidence from Machine Learning, PDF.
    3. [投资研究’24] Shengdi Zhou, Faqin Lan, 融资约束下的企业并购行为：求救动机还是制约条件？. PDF.
    4. [上海经济研究’24] Jie Wu, Shengdi Zhou, Gaiyin Wang, 数字化转型对企业绩效影响研究——基于数字化深度与广度视角的实证分析, PDF.
    5. [外国经济与管理’24] Shengdi Zhou, Faqin Lan, 司法改善与年报披露相似性——来自我国巡回法庭准自然实验的经验证据, PDF.

    🎖 Selected Awards

    1. 2023, Award-winning Paper at the 4th Pujiang Forum: “Corporate Mergers and Acquisitions under Financing Constraints: Motivation for Rescue or Restrictive Conditions”
    2. 2023, Paper Selected for the 9th China Financial Management Annual Conference: “Digital Transformation, Optimal Enterprise Scale, and Mergers and Acquisitions Behavior”
    3. 2023, Award-winning Paper at the Statistical Modeling Competition: “Determinants of Successful Mergers and Acquisitions in China: Evidence from Machine Learning” (City Three)
    4. 2023, Mergers and Acquisitions Case Studies included in “Typical Mergers and Acquisitions Cases in the Chinese Securities Market 2022”, including “300015 Elens: Surge in Ophthalmic Market, Acquiring Nearly 30 Hospitals”, and “002843 Taijia Holdings: High Premium Acquisition of Marginally Profitable Assets, Initiating a Dual-Core Business Track”.

    📖 Educations

    • 2021.09 - Now, PhD, School of Economy and Management, East China Normal University.
    • 2017.09 - 2021.06, Undergraduate, School of Economy and Management, East China Normal University.

    📚 Academic Services

    • Part time researcher at Shanghai Institute of Mergers and Acquisitions Finance
